title: Stenophragma sewerzowii
taxonomy: Stenophragma sewerzowii is a species of moss in the family Sematophyllaceae. The genus Stenophragma is a part of the subclass Bryidae, under the class Bryopsida. This classification places it within the division Bryophyta, a group of non-vascular plants. The family Sematophyllaceae is part of the order Hypnales, a large and diverse group of mosses. The classification of Stenophragma sewerzowii reflects its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
